untranslatable_reason: TRIX (Triple Exponential Moving Average) is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal specifies a three-step EMA calculation with period-over-period differences and 10,000x scaling, which cannot be accurately replicated using only the provided indicators (sma, ema, rsi, atr, bb, macd, adx, stochastic, etc.). Substituted macd as a trend-following momentum alternative, but this does not preserve the original TRIX logic. Additionally, the consecutive-period rise/fall conditions ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]) are incomplete in the source signal and cannot be properly specified.
translation_notes: Original signal uses TRIX indicator which is not available. MACD was substituted as the closest available trend-following momentum indicator for crossover logic. The alternative entry/exit conditions based on consecutive periods of rise/fall could not be translated due to: (1) missing threshold values in source, (2) lack of momentum-streak detection operators in allowed operators list. Signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as it can generate both long and short signals depending on TRIX direction.
